title: Device Home Screen - Device Connected and Update available
scenario: Device Home Screen displays Software Update and Release Notes buttons in status box under Battery icons when firmware update is available
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected to the Android device.
3. Navigate to the Home screen of the app.
4. Verify that a firmware update is available for the connected headset.
5. Observe the status box located under the Battery icons on the Device Home Screen.
6. Check if "Software Update" and "Release Notes" buttons are displayed in the status box.
expected: The Device Home Screen displays "Software Update" and "Release Notes" buttons in the status box under the Battery icons when a headset is connected and a firmware update is available.
